user_prompt: X3 game circular avatar frame, World Cup / soccer theme, France. Use reference image 1 as the EXACT target paradigm (a clean team-color ring with a flag-textured soccer ball at bottom-center) and reference image 2 for the skeleton/ornaments (top gold crest+gem, side gold diamond clips, bottom gold wings). Build France: the RING BAND = single dominant royal-blue color band (do NOT make the ring tricolor — keep it one solid blue so the flag-ball stands out), with slim gold edge trim. the soccer ball is the FRENCH FLAG: three vertical panels blue-white-red wrapped on the ball, with cel-shaded glossy highlight kept ON TOP of the flag so it reads as a real ball not a flat 2D disc. The flag-ball is the single identity focus; keep the ring a clean solid team color so the ball stands out. National identity must be instantly recognizable. Keep the EXACT same skeleton/layout/proportions and clean cel-shaded X3 game-UI art style. Square 1:1, circular hollow center fully transparent for avatar, fully transparent background, NO text, NO national flag cloth draped over frame, NO scene background, readable at 256x256.
